_comment: Victor -> Victini reveal at 2536/106/2900. Keyframes are the ORIGINAL tower-verified path (RCON block-probed 2026-07-16) TRANSLATED by the +13.4/-25.0/+84.5 move delta from 2522.6/131/2815.5, so the framing RELATIVE to Victini is preserved exactly. The reveal spot is assumed open like the tower ledge — if it isn't, re-probe/nudge in-world. Victor now STANDS here (his placement was moved 2026-07-22), so sango/victor_transform just plays this scene IN PLACE — no teleport, no forceload (the player is right here talking to him). The cue at tick 60 runs sango/victor_transform_swap, which flashes the humanoid into Victini ON CAMERA, then the cry + title land as the camera cranes over and drops to the south close-up. KEYFRAME-Y CONVENTION (docs/ENGINE_FINDINGS.md): the spectated rig renders ~1.78 above keyframe y.
_skippable_note: NON-skippable ON PURPOSE: the transform (victor_transform_swap) fires from the tick-60 cue and is what kills the apprentice + spawns Victini. The dispatch is now one-shot (victor_transform_fired), so a skip BEFORE tick 60 would end the scene with no Victini and no way to re-trigger — a soft-lock. Letting the ~7.5s scene always run to tick 60 guarantees the reveal completes.

cues.subtitle: §7It was waiting for someone worth speaking to
